templates.name: Do you offer exchanges?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we are unable to make exchanges. However, you may return your product and place a new order. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://maaji.attn.tv/sl/b7LXqllm and you can initiate your return here: https://maaji.attn.tv/sl/WE4dgTwL/

templates.name: What does assorted mean? Is it possible to choose a print/design?
templates.content: We have two kinds of assorted accessories. In the ones named "Special Assorted", you will receive one of the prints shown on the images. In the ones named only as "Assorted", the images are only for illustrative purposes and you would receive any Maajical print, not necessarily the ones shown.

templates.name: Difference of bottom cuts / Different coverage.
templates.content: We have four types of bottoms, and the differences are mainly the back coverage. The Hipster has the best coverage. Then we have the Signature Cut, the Cheeky Cut and, the one that will provide less coverage is the Chi Chi Cut.

templates.name: Do I have to pay for a return?
templates.content: We offer free returns.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our estimated delivery time depends on the region. For domestic orders, it usually takes 4 to 7 business days. You can check out all our shipping regions and timeframes here: https://www.maaji.co/pages/shipping-returns-refunds-and-exchanges

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.maaji.co/pages/terms-conditions

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/maaji/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/MaajiSwimwear/

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.maaji.co/pages/shipping-returns-refunds-and-exchanges

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our products generally run true to size. Would you mind sharing your usual size? You can also check out our size charts here: https://maaji.attn.tv/sl/-GJlBnEP

templates.name: Retroactive discount
templates.content: Unfortunately, we can't apply the promo code after an order has been placed, however, you can still use it with any other order anytime.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.maaji.co/collections/sale-section

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at help@maaji.co Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at help@maaji.co Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find our products at Bloomingdale's, Anthropologie, Nordstrom, Swimwear World, or Amazon.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@maaji.co. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $100. Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.maaji.co/pages/fit-guide

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.maaji.co/collections/sale-section
